title: Electron microscopy (EM) analysis of LRRK2-Nanotube assembles
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ho2v","text":"This protocol details methods for the analysis of LRRK2-Nanotube assembles by negative stained EM and Cryo-EM.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"fv7ab","text":"Solutions to prepare:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cobi2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2bpum","text":"Low salt buffer:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a8dua","text":"      Low salt buffer    HEPES (7.4)  20mM    NaCl  90mM    MgCl2  2.5mM    Glycerol  7%    DTT  2mM    GDP  20μM  ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":115}],"data":{}},{"key":"fct7l","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0":{"0":"B"},"0_0":"","1":{"0":"_"},"1_0":"","1_1":"","2":{"0":"1"},"2_0":"","2_1":"","3_0":"","3_1":"","4_0":"","4_1":"","5_0":"","5_1":"","6_0":"","6_1":"","A_1":{"className":"_dt-h-left"},"A_2":{"className":"_dt-h-left"},"A_3":{"className":"_dt-h-left"},"A_4":{"className":"_dt-h-left"},"A_5":{"className":"_dt-h-left"},"A_6":{"className":"_dt-h-left"},"B_1":{"className":"_dt-h-left"},"B_2":{"className":"_dt-h-left"},"B_3":{"className":"_dt-h-left"},"B_4":{"className":"_dt-h-left"},"B_5":{"className":"_dt-h-left"},"B_6":{"className":"_dt-h-left"}},"colTitles":["",""],"colWidths":["174.98958587646484",100],"data":[["HEPES (7.4)","20 mM"],["NaCl","90 mM"],["MgCl2","2.5 mM"],["Glycerol","7%"],["DTT","2 mM"],["GDP","20 μM"]],"guid":"781847C41F9811EDAD140A58A9FEAC02","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["HEPES (7.4)","20 mM"],["NaCl","90 mM"],["MgCl2","2.5 mM"],["Glycerol","7%"],["DTT","2 mM"],["GDP","20 μM"]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23,23,23]}}}}
steps: Prepare samples in a PCR tube with 300 nanomolar (nM) LRKK2, 20 micromolar (µM) lipid nanotubes and 1 millimolar (mM) GMPPNP.
Glow-discharge carbon-coated grids (25 mA, 00:00:45 ) during the sample incubation time.
Place the discharged grids on a piece of parafilm.
After incubation, apply 6 µL of the samples to the grid and adsorbed on the grid for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .
Blot the grid with filter paper and stained with 2% uranyl acetate for 00:00:40 .
Dry the grid with filter paper.
Collect images using a Talos L 120C TEM microscope at 80 kV with Velox software and a 4k × 4K Ceta CMOS camera (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
Dialyze freshly purified LRRK2 into the Low salt buffer.
After dialysis, incubate LRRK2 ( 2 micromolar (µM) ) with the kinase inhibitor MLi-2 ( 5 micromolar (µM) ) for 00:10:00 On ice .

Add 20 micromolar (µM) lipid nanotubes into the mixture above and further incubate for 01:00:00 at Room temperature in the presence of 1 millimolar (mM) GTP. Note: The total volume of the mixture is 12 µL .
Glow-discharge C-flat™ holey carbon gold grids (CF-1.2/1.3-3Au) (15mA, 00:00:45 ) during the sample incubation time, then place the discharged grids on a piece of parafilm.
After incubation, apply 4 µL of the samples to the grid.

Plunge-freeze sample-loaded grids in liquid ethane-propane mixture using a Vitrobot Mark IV (FEI) with the following parameters: blot force, 0; blot time, 00:00:01 ; wait time, 00:00:30 ; drain time, 00:00:00 ; humidity, 100%.

Collect cryo-EM micrographs on a Titan Krios transmission electron microscope (Thermo Fisher Scientific) operating at 300 kV, equipped with a post column GIF quantum energy filter and a Gatan K3 Summit DED camera (Gatan, Pleasanton, CA, USA).

Perform the data collection with the SerialEM software. Record movies in super-resolution mode with a physical pixel size of 1.098 A˚ (super-resolution pixel size is 0.549 A˚) and a defocus range of - 1 µm to - 3 µm . The total dose of ~60.6 e− Å−2 was attained by using a dose rate of ~23.5 e− pixel−1 s−1 across 43 frames for 00:02:00 00:00:58 total exposure time. The initial drift and beam-induced motions was corrected using MotionCor2.
creator: xinbo.wang
